50dbab40dec156efa590287269ee422f2c2af477.text: Hello again brother [fremennik name]. What need you of me this day? You can always rely on my assistance!

d92a3f4d7880888f8eb005dc0f335acfcadbc712.text: My door is always open should you ever need my help [fremennik name].

4a050e4312ddd0c65809c753d23c22a42fc8deb3.text: [fremennik name]... It has been too long since last we met!

4f7b5f3daf704131a48d147e07c4209f32d2501d.text: Welcome back brother [fremennik name]. It is always a pleasure to see you here!

c16ae5b9c9b6bff475c46794fd781f9395226c35.text: Welcome back sister [fremennik name]. It is always a pleasure to see you here!

aae1cab00a8b486ff5d04cfdbe79c0be4ee852b3.text: My apologies brother [fremennik name]! I have not time to tarry here with you!

226f235c64667b63dafd3ed2566b036c3d1bc4b2.text: How are you [fremennik name]? I hope all fares well with you this day!

0531dffe04126fbc16eeb03493a35fd49da5d339.text: How can you steal from me, [fremennik name]?
